provenance.split_method: Offline grouping of completed official_eval_results.jsonl by instance-id prefix; no split field was used by model prompts.
provenance.verification_command: Recompute arithmetic from official_eval_results.jsonl and compare all/all-subset weighted averages.

limitations: Generation and approximate local evaluation currently share one script and task object; the model prompts receive only the visible question, but the process boundary is not yet hardened.
Search-time contamination was not scanned in this historical run.
The run uses snippets and Tavily answers rather than raw page content.
The run has one attempt per task and is not directly comparable to Avg@4 or Pass@4 results.
Raw outputs are excluded from Git because they may contain large third-party web content and operational metadata.
